hero.title: Canada & Australia Immigration - Intense Expertise, For Your Success
hero.subtitle: Expert Guidance for Canada & Australia Immigration
hero.description: Bestway Consulting has provided professional immigration services for Canada and Australia since 2007. For over 18 years, we have helped individuals, couples, families, international students, skilled workers, and business owners successfully immigrate and settle abroad. Certified RCIC consultants and Registered Migration Agents specializing in Express Entry, Provincial Nominee Programs, skilled migration, family sponsorship, and comprehensive settlement support.

about.title: About Bestway Consulting
about.description: Since 2007, Bestway Consulting has provided expert immigration services for Canada and Australia. Led by Director Michelle Jeong-Ja Han (Regulated Canadian Immigration Consultant & Registered Migration Agent), we specialize in strategic immigration planning, skilled migration, family sponsorship, and comprehensive settlement support. Our dual accreditation in both Canada and Australia allows us to compare countries objectively and recommend the best pathway for your unique circumstances.
about.missionDescription: At Bestway Consulting, we understand that immigration is one of the most important decisions in a person's life. Our goal is to provide accurate advice, honest assessment, and personalized strategies tailored to each client's unique background and future goals. Our services extend beyond immigration applications—we also provide guidance in international education, settlement planning, financial services, taxation, accounting, real estate, and business establishment support.

honesty.title: Honesty
honesty.description: We place our clients' interests first and provide realistic, transparent advice based on current immigration laws and policies. We do not encourage unnecessary applications or provide misleading expectations.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.description: We carefully manage each case from assessment to final outcome. Our team pays close attention to documentation, deadlines, procedural requirements, and policy updates to ensure applications are prepared accurately and professionally.

professionalism.title: Professionalism
professionalism.description: Immigration laws and policies change frequently in both Canada and Australia. Our consultants continuously monitor government policy updates, processing trends, legislative changes, and immigration programme developments to provide up-to-date professional advice.

michelle.name: Michelle Jeong-Ja Han
michelle.title: Director & Senior Immigration Consultant
credentials: Registered Migration Agent (Australia) — Full Member of MARA (MARN: 0963835)
Graduate Certificate in Australian Immigration Law and Practice — Victoria University, Australia
Certificate in Canadian Immigration Consulting with Honours — Humber College, Canada
Bachelor of Arts (English Literature & Language) — Korea University
michelle.description: Michelle Han holds dual professional immigration qualifications in both Australia and Canada. This rare dual accreditation allows her to assess and compare immigration opportunities for both countries simultaneously and recommend the most suitable pathway based on each client's education, work experience, occupation, family situation, and long-term goals. Having personally experienced immigration and settlement in Canada, Australia, and the United States, Michelle understands the practical and emotional aspects of the immigration journey. She is known for her professional, detail-oriented, and highly organized approach to immigration case management.

whyChoose.title: Why Choose Bestway Consulting?
whyChoose.description: Immigration laws and visa programmes are becoming increasingly complex. Canada and Australia regularly revise occupation lists, skilled migration requirements, partner visa policies, student visa regulations, employer-sponsored visa programmes, and business migration pathways.
points: Clear explanation of risks and options
Honest guidance based on current policy trends
Dual licensing in Canada and Australia

canada.title: Canada Immigration Pathways
canada.description: Navigate Canada's complex immigration system with expert guidance on Express Entry, Provincial Nominee Programs, family sponsorship, work permits, and citizenship.

expressEntry.title: Express Entry System
expressEntry.description: Canada's primary electronic system for managing federal economic immigration applications. The system manages applications for Federal Skilled Worker Program (FSWP), Canadian Experience Class (CEC), and Federal Skilled Trades Program (FSTP).
expressEntry.crsDescription: CRS points are awarded based on age, education, language proficiency, skilled work experience, Canadian work experience, spouse/partner factors, and adaptability.

spousalSponsorship.title: Canada Spousal & Partner Sponsorship
spousalSponsorship.description: Canadian citizens and permanent residents may sponsor their spouse or partner for Canadian permanent residence. This remains one of the most common and successful immigration pathways to Canada.
eligiblePartners: Spouse: Legally married husband or wife
Common-Law Partner: Lived together continuously for at least 12 months
Conjugal Partner: Genuine long-term relationship with exceptional circumstances

workPermits.title: Work Permits
workPermits.description: Canada offers various temporary work permit pathways including LMIA-based and LMIA-exempt options.

citizenship.title: Canadian Citizenship
citizenship.description: Permanent residents may apply for Canadian citizenship after meeting eligibility requirements including physical presence of 1,095 days within the last 5 years.
benefits: Access to social and economic benefits

australia.title: Australia Immigration Pathways
australia.description: Explore Australia's skilled migration programs, employer sponsorship, partner visas, and permanent residency pathways with expert guidance.

skilledMigration.title: General Skilled Migration (GSM)
skilledMigration.description: Australia's skilled migration programme targets qualified workers whose occupations are in demand.

employerSponsorship.title: Employer-Sponsored Migration
employerSponsorship.description: The Skills in Demand (SID) visa allows Australian employers to sponsor overseas skilled workers.

partnerVisa.title: Australia Partner Visa
partnerVisa.description: Australia's Partner Visa programme allows the spouse or de facto partner of an Australian citizen, permanent resident, or eligible New Zealand citizen to obtain permanent residence.

parentVisa.title: Australia Parent Visa
parentVisa.description: Australia offers contributory parent visa programmes for eligible parents of Australian citizens or permanent residents.

items.question: How long does the immigration process typically take?
items.answer: Processing times vary by program. Express Entry typically takes 6 months, while family sponsorship takes 12-24 months. Provincial Nominee Programs take 3-8 months. We provide updated timelines during your consultation.

items.question: What are the main requirements for Canadian Express Entry?
items.answer: You need a CRS score of 490+, valid work experience (1+ years), language test results (CLB 7+), and educational credentials assessment. Age 25-32 provides maximum points. Our team helps you optimize your profile.

items.question: Can I apply for Australian immigration with a non-skilled job?
items.answer: Australian skilled migration requires your occupation on the skilled list. However, you may be eligible for employer-sponsored or state-nominated programs. We can assess all your options.

items.question: How much does immigration consulting cost?
items.answer: Fees vary based on services needed. We offer free initial consultations to assess your case. Detailed pricing is provided after evaluation. We only charge for services we can actually help with.

items.question: What documents do I need for family sponsorship?
items.answer: Required documents include passport copies, birth/marriage certificates, police certificates, medical exams, proof of relationship, and financial documents. We provide a complete checklist customized to your situation.

items.question: Is it guaranteed that my application will be approved?
items.answer: We cannot guarantee approval, but we maximize your chances through expert strategy and document preparation. Our success rate is high due to thorough case assessment and application optimization.
